nasb.text: All her majesty Has departed from the daughter of Zion; Her princes have become like deer That have found no pasture; And they have fled without strength Before the pursuer.

esv.text: From the daughter of Zion all her majesty has departed. Her princes have become like deer that find no pasture; they fled without strength before the pursuer.

cnv.text: 錫安所有的尊榮，都離開了她的居民。 她的眾領袖都像找不著牧場的鹿； 在追趕的人面前無力逃走。

ccb.text: 锡安的尊荣消逝， 她的首领像找不到草吃的鹿， 无力逃脱敌人的追赶。
